title: April 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}
'''April 22''' is the 112th day of the year (113th in leap years). There are 253 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Mark Jones]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Roman Coppola]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Misty Lee]] is born.
*1976 – [[Chuck Wendig]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]] concludes filming for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] with a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] shot (shot 110P).
*[[1980]] – ''[[As Long As We Live...]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*1980 – [[Star Wars (1977) 37|''Star Wars'' (1977) 37]] published.
*[[1992]] – ''[[The Han Solo Adventures]]'' republished.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Illustrated Companion]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] released for the [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]].
*[[2009]] – [[Dark Times 13|''Dark Times'' 13]] published.
*2009 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 40|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 40]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Insider 149|''Star Wars Insider'' 149]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 4|''Star Wars'' (2015) 4]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 4|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 4]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2025]] – [[Andor Season 2|''Andor'' Season 2]] premiered on Disney+ with "[[One Year Later]]", "[[Sagrona Teema]]", and "[[Harvest]]".
*2025 – ''[[The High Republic: The Edge of Balance, Vol. 4]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fear (trade paperback)]]'' published.
*[[2026]] – [[Galaxy's Edge – Echoes of the Empire 1|''Galaxy's Edge – Echoes of the Empire'' 1]] to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Jedi Path and Book of Sith Deluxe Box Set]]'' to be reprinted.
<noinclude>
